patch:
--- a/firmware.c
+++ b/firmware.c
@@ -8,7 +8,8 @@
 #define PWM_MAX_CHANNELS     8U
 #define PWM_FREQ_MIN_HZ      1U
 #define PWM_FREQ_MAX_HZ      1000000U
-#define PWM_DUTY_SCALE       10000U  /* 0-10000 = 0-100.00% */
+/* BREAKING: duty cycle scale changed from 10000 to 65535 (16-bit full range) */
+#define PWM_DUTY_SCALE       65535U  /* 0-65535 = 0-100% */
 
 typedef enum {
     PWM_POLARITY_ACTIVE_HIGH = 0,
